name: dna-inheritance
description: Comprehensive test of DNA inheritance system with multiple configuration levels
author: MCP Test Framework
descriptionLong: This test validates the DNA inheritance system that merges configuration from multiple levels (system defaults, project DNA, user DNA, and explicit parameters) with proper priority. It tests deep merging, inheritance priority, and override behavior.
objectives: Verify DNA inheritance from system defaults (fallback level)
Verify DNA inheritance from project DNA (.document-dna.json)
Verify DNA inheritance from user DNA (.document-user.json)
Verify explicit parameters override all inherited values
Verify inheritance priority: user > project > system
Verify deep merging of nested objects (header, footer, company, defaults)
Verify undefined values don't overwrite inherited values
Verify cache invalidation when files change
Verify getAllDNALevels returns all inheritance levels
Verify applyDNAToInput injects DNA where parameters are missing
Verify backward compatibility with legacy DNA functions

steps.name: Setup: Clean test environment
steps.check: Test directory is clean with no DNA files

steps.name: Test 1: System defaults inheritance
steps.check: System defaults are applied when no DNA files exist
steps.expected: DNA not applied, uses professional style from system defaults

steps.name: Test 4: DNA merging - partial override
steps.check: Merging preserves non-overridden values from lower levels
steps.setup: Create DNA files with partial overlapping configurations
steps.expected: User header text preserved, project footer text preserved

steps.name: Test 5: Deep merging
steps.check: Deep merge combines nested objects correctly
steps.setup: Create DNA files with nested object configurations
steps.expected: Nested properties from different levels are merged

steps.name: Test 6: Explicit parameter override
steps.check: Explicit parameters override inherited DNA values
steps.setup: Create DNA files and pass explicit parameters
steps.expected: Explicit parameters override all inherited values

steps.name: Test 7: Undefined doesn't overwrite
steps.check: Undefined values don't overwrite inherited values
steps.setup: Create DNA files with undefined values in merge
steps.expected: Undefined values don't overwrite inherited values

steps.name: Test 8: getAllDNALevels
steps.check: Returns all inheritance levels for debugging
steps.setup: Create DNA files and call getAllDNALevels
steps.expected: All four DNA levels are returned

steps.name: Test 9: Inheritance priority verification
steps.setup: Create all three DNA levels with conflicting values

steps.name: Test 10: Cache invalidation
steps.check: Cache is properly invalidated on file change
steps.setup: Modify DNA files and verify new values are loaded

steps.name: Cleanup: Restore test environment
steps.expected: All DNA files and test documents are removed

expectedOutput.message: string containing 'WRITTEN TO DISK' or 'DNA levels loaded'

testScenarios.name: test-system-defaults
testScenarios.description: Test DNA inheritance with system defaults (no DNA files)

testScenarios.name: test-project-dna-only
testScenarios.description: Test DNA inheritance with project DNA only

testScenarios.name: test-user-dna-only
testScenarios.description: Test DNA inheritance with user DNA only

testScenarios.name: test-dna-merging
testScenarios.description: Test merging of DNA levels with partial overrides

testScenarios.name: test-explicit-override
testScenarios.description: Test explicit parameters overriding DNA inheritance
testScenarios.setup: Create DNA files and test explicit parameter override

testScenarios.name: test-inheritance-priority
testScenarios.description: Test inheritance priority chain (user > project > system)
testScenarios.setup: Create all three DNA levels with conflicting values

testScenarios.name: test-undefined-merging
testScenarios.description: Test that undefined values don't overwrite inherited values
testScenarios.setup: Test DNA merging with undefined values

testScenarios.name: test-deep-merging
testScenarios.description: Test deep merging of nested objects
testScenarios.setup: Test deep merge behavior with nested configurations
